items.title: MGROS TİCARET A.Ş. Özel Durum Açıklaması (Genel)
items.content:
Migros Ticaret A.Ş. announced the opening of 23 new stores in March 2025, including Migros, Migros Jet, Macrocenter, and Mion formats, increasing the total store count to 3,642 and net sales area to 2,043,000 square meters.

Migros Ticaret A.Ş. has opened 23 new stores in March 2025. These include 12 Migros stores, 6 Migros Jet stores, 4 Macrocenter stores, and 1 Mion store. As of March 31, 2025, the total number of stores has reached 3,642, with a total net sales area of 2,043,000 square meters. The announcement details the store openings and resulting expansion of the company's retail footprint.
